title: sohmaea diffusa
intro: Sohmaea diffusa, also known as the East Indian thorn apple, is a plant species that belongs to the Solanaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, particularly those related to the digestive system, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Sohmaea diffusa include relief from dyspepsia, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of Sohmaea diffusa can be obtained in the form of extracts, teas, or tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive problems and other health conditions.
